title: Tantalizers Acquire Tade Ogidan Grand Media Projects Limited - FinancialEDGE
description: Tantalizers Plc, a food and entertainment focused group, has acquired Grand Media Projects Limited, a media and entertainment company led by veteran filmmaker Tade Ogidan, making its strategic entry into the entertainment sector. The acquisition aligns with Tantalizers’ goal to expand beyond food into high-growth, youth driven sectors like entertainment, media, and digital content. It
html:
Tantalizers Plc, a food and entertainment focused group, has acquired Grand Media Projects Limited, a media and entertainment company led by veteran filmmaker Tade Ogidan, making its strategic entry into the entertainment sector.

The acquisition aligns with Tantalizers’ goal to expand beyond food into high-growth, youth driven sectors like entertainment, media, and digital content.

It capitalizes on Nigeria’s booming entertainment industry, which is gaining global recognition and economic significance.

Chairman of Tantaluzers Plc, Adam Nuru noted that the acquisition is a leap into content development, branded experiences, and event activations, aiming to create value by merging food, lifestyle, and entertainment.

For Tade Ogidan Chairman, Grand Media)* Expressed excitement about creative opportunities and praised Tantalizers’ tech-driven entertainment platform as a game-changer.

Tantalizers which share price was N2.30 kobo at the close of trading on Friday May 16, 2025,  aims to leverage synergies between its customer base and Grand Media’s assets, with a new entertainment platform set to launch in the coming months.
